first_run.rationale: Although the score dropped by one point, the qualitative reasoning in both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions correctly identify the same critical gaps: minimal C++ experience and a complete lack of experience with industrial protocols and cybersecurity standards. The differences in the text are minor rephrasings and shifts in emphasis on which details to highlight from the resume, which is consistent with normal run-to-run variation. Crucially, no part of the variant's reasoning keys off the candidate's location.
